work.title: Example: The Threshold
work.logline: A character pauses at a doorway and almost turns back.
work.plot_summary: Single-scene study of hesitation at a threshold.

scene_cards.title: The pause
scene_cards.what_happens: THEY put a hand on the knob. Wait. Open. Leave.

shot_moments.subject: HAND ON KNOB
shot_moments.action_text: Hand rests on the knob. Knuckles whiten. Release. Grip again.

decision_digests.situation: Character about to leave a life stage; words would cheapen it.
decision_digests.decision: MS on hand on knob; no face reverse; no score.
decision_digests.rationale: Body decides before face admits it.
